screen.lumen_tooltips.config.title: Lumen Tooltips
screen.lumen_tooltips.config.preview.boo: The first page of the book appears here.
screen.lumen_tooltips.config.item_editor: Install Item Editor build 19+ for item editing.
Install Item Editor build 19+ for direct storage saving.
config.lumen_tooltips.controls.details_m: Controls when detail-only tooltip lines are shown.
config.lumen_tooltips.controls.details_k: Key held for detail-only tooltip lines.
config.lumen_tooltips.controls.item_edit: Opens the hovered inventory item when Item Editor is installed.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.item_edito: Copies the hovered item directly into Item Editor storage.
Chooses the first page with space, an exact page number, or an exact visible page name.
Saves into the first empty slot on this exact Item Editor page.
Targets this exact visible page name and names automatically created pages.
Creates a page when the named page is missing or every existing page is full.
Reports storage success or failure in chat.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.durability: Adds remaining percentage to Minecraft's advanced durability line.
Colors durability green, yellow, or red based on remaining percentage.
Durability at or below this percentage uses the warning color.
Durability at or below this percentage uses the danger color.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.food.enabl: Shows nutrition and saturation inside food item tooltips.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.food.show_: Adds saturation to the food tooltip line.
Shows food status effects while the detail key is held.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.enchantmen: Shows enchantment descriptions while the detail key is held.
Replaces Roman numerals with decimal numbers in enchantment tooltips.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.comparison: Compares hovered equipment with the item currently equipped while the detail key is held.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.navigation: Shows client-known map coverage and compass target information.
Shows filled-map scale, coverage, and unexplored directions.
Shows client-known lodestone and recovery compass target details.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.safety.tra: Limits malicious translation expansion. Disabling this can freeze or crash the client.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.safety.glo: Checks every Component.visit call. Disable only when another mod needs the original expanded text.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.safety.max: Maximum text accepted from one component traversal before it is blocked.
Maximum nested translation depth accepted before text is blocked.
Maximum translated components visited during one traversal.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.tooltip.ed: Keeps tooltip boxes inside the visible screen where possible.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.tooltip.sc: Allows mouse wheel scrolling when a tooltip is taller than the screen.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.tooltip.sh: Shows available preview, container, item editing, and storage controls in tooltips.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.tooltip.ma: Auto uses the current GUI-scaled screen width. Explicit values may exceed the screen width.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.tooltip.sc: Controls how many pixels each mouse wheel step moves a long tooltip.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.en: Shows visual tooltip previews for supported items.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.ac: Controls when visual previews are shown.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.op: Opens stored container contents when the open bind is pressed over a container item.
Key pressed while hovering a container item to open its contents.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.sh: Shows shulker box contents as a tooltip grid.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.co: Shows stored contents for chest-like container items.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.bu: Shows bundle contents as a tooltip grid.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.it: Shows visual previews for written books, crossbows, and fireworks.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.bo: Shows the author skin, page count, and first-page preview for written books.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.cr: Shows loaded projectiles and charge time for crossbows.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.fi: Shows firework timing, explosion shapes, and color swatches.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.en: Shows entity models for supported entity-bearing items.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.ar: Shows a radius and particle preview for area-effect clouds stored in spawners.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.di: Shows block, item, and text display entities stored in spawners.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.it: Shows item and glow item frames stored in entity-bearing items.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.di: Sets the fixed horizontal angle of display entity previews.
Sets the fixed vertical angle of display entity previews.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.sp: Shows the entity stored in spawn egg items.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.mo: Shows the entity stored in mob bucket items.
config.lumen_tooltips.modules.preview.sp: Shows the entity stored in mob spawner items.
message.lumen_tooltips.item_editor.stora: The configured Item Editor storage page was not found.
No free Item Editor storage slot is available.
Could not save %s to Item Editor storage.
An Item Editor storage save is already running.
tooltip.lumen_tooltips.unsafe_text: Translation Crash Prevented by Lumen Tooltips
enchantment.minecraft.aqua_affinity.desc: Removes the mining speed penalty while underwater.
enchantment.minecraft.bane_of_arthropods: Increases damage against arthropods and briefly slows them.
enchantment.minecraft.binding_curse.desc: Prevents equipped cursed items from being removed.
enchantment.minecraft.channeling.desc: Summons lightning when a thrown trident hits during a thunderstorm.
enchantment.minecraft.density.desc: Increases mace smash damage for each block fallen.
enchantment.minecraft.fire_protection.de: Reduces fire damage and burning time.
enchantment.minecraft.frost_walker.desc: Freezes nearby water beneath the wearer.
enchantment.minecraft.impaling.desc: Increases trident damage against aquatic targets.
enchantment.minecraft.infinity.desc: Allows bows to fire without consuming normal arrows.
enchantment.minecraft.loyalty.desc: Returns a thrown trident to its owner.
enchantment.minecraft.lunge.desc: Propels the user forward after a spear attack, consuming hunger and durability.
enchantment.minecraft.lure.desc: Reduces the wait for fish to bite.
enchantment.minecraft.multishot.desc: Fires three projectiles at once while consuming one.
enchantment.minecraft.piercing.desc: Allows crossbow projectiles to pass through targets.
enchantment.minecraft.riptide.desc: Launches the user with a thrown trident in water or rain.
enchantment.minecraft.soul_speed.desc: Increases movement speed on soul sand and soul soil.
enchantment.minecraft.thorns.desc: Damages attackers when the wearer is hit.
enchantment.minecraft.unbreaking.desc: Reduces how quickly durability is consumed.
enchantment.minecraft.vanishing_curse.de: Destroys the item when its owner dies.
enchantment.minecraft.wind_burst.desc: Launches the attacker upward after a successful mace smash.
